method_summary: SWE-agent introduces a custom agent-computer interface (ACI) that enables language model agents to autonomously perform software engineering tasks by enhancing their ability to create/edit code files, navigate repositories, and execute tests.
key_innovation: Custom agent-computer interface (ACI) designed specifically for language model agents to interact with software engineering environments
baselines_compared: previous state-of-the-art achieved with non-interactive LMs
title: SWE-agent: Agent-Computer Interfaces Enable Automated Software Engineering
